zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Constable of Halsham於1177年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親William Constable27歲，母親Julia Altoft22歲。他於1200年與Adela de Oyli在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1251年在他的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Constable of Halsham于1177年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲William Constable27岁，母亲Julia Altoft22岁。他于1200年与Adela de Oyli在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1251年在他的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Constable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for the law-enforcement officer of a parish, from Middle English, Old French conestable, cunestable, from Late Latin comes stabuli ‘officer of the stable’. The title was also borne by various other officials during the Middle Ages, including the chief officer of a household or court, or a military officer, and this may in some cases be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Dutch Constapel, an occupational name for the chief gunner aboard a ship or in the garrison of a fort.

variants.name: Costabile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Ciro, Nino, Agnese, Angelo, Duilio, Enrico, Ercole, Franco, Palma.
occupational name from medieval Greek kontostablēs ‘chamberlain’, from medieval Latin comes stabuli, literally ‘count of the stable’ (see Constable ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Constable of Halsham was born in 1177, in Yorkshire, England, his father, William Constable, was 27 and his mother, Julia Altoft, was 22. He married Adela de Oyli in 1200, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1251, in his hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Constable of Halsham est né en 1177, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Constable, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Julia Altoft, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Adela de Oyli en 1200, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1251, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Constable of Halsham 1177 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Constable 27 und seine Mutter Julia Altoft 22. Er hat 1200 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Adela de Oyli geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1251 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Constable of Halsham è nato il nel 1177 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Constable, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Julia Altoft, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Adela de Oyli nel 1200, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1251, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Constable of Halshamが1177年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Constableは27歳，母Julia Altoftは22歳であった。1200年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでAdela de Oyliと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1251年に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Constable of Halsham(이)가 1177년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Constable(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Julia Altoft(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Adela de Oyli(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1251년 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Constable of Halsham nasceu em 1177, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Constable, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Julia Altoft, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Adela de Oyli em 1200, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1251, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Constable of Halsham родился в 1177 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Constable было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Julia Altoft, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Adela de Oyli в 1200 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1251 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Constable of Halsham nació en 1177, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Constable, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Julia Altoft, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Adela de Oyli en 1200, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1251, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
